title: lupinus albifrons var. austromontanus
intro: Lupinus albifrons var. austromontanus, also known as the Western lupine or White bush lupine, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with this plant include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Lupinus albifrons var. austromontanus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
